title: Zombie Rush
description: Zombie Rush is a zombie-themed modpack. Survive hordes that appear every night, scavenge for resources, build shelters, and stay alive. Every game is a constant survival challenge.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e67e7a2639efc97ee188a8337792f9ddea8ecbf.png)

Zombie Rush ModPack transforms your world into a place overrun by zombies. 

This modpack adds different types of zombies, increases their numbers, and makes the night far more dangerous. 

You must explore, gather resources, build shelters, and prepare to defend yourself against relentless hordes. 

Survival is the main goal: every decision matters, and each night brings a new challenge. 

Perfect for players who want a more challenging Minecraft experience focused on action-packed zombie battles.
